title: ciminalis angustifolia subsp. occidentalis
intro: Ciminalis angustifolia subsp. occidentalis, also known as western clematis or western pasque flower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ciminalis angustifolia subsp. occidentalis include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
